defs: The act of pretending, or laying claim; the act of asserting right or title.
quotes: The arrogant pretensions of Glengarry contributed to protract the discussion.

defs: A claim made, whether true or false; a right alleged or assumed; a holding out the appearance of possessing a certain character; as, pretensions to scholarship.
quotes: This was but an invention and pretension given out by the Spaniards.
Men indulge those opinions and practices that favor their pretensions.
